html:
THE VENDETTA GAZETTE

Special Edition • March 22, 2026 • "All the Blood That's Fit to Print"

THE IRON TITANS TIGHTEN THEIR DEATH GRIP AS VACATION BROTHERS TURN UP THE HEAT

The blood-soaked cobblestones of Vendetta City bear witness to another week of spectacular savagery, dear readers, as our two undisputed emperors of evil, Wu-Tang "The Iron Fist of the East Side" and the perpetually pristine Sir Caprice, continue their deadly waltz with mathematical precision that would make Einstein weep!

In a performance that proves consistency is the hallmark of true criminal artistry, Wu-Tang seized 104 fresh turfs this week – a single territory more than last week's haul – while unleashing a devastating 96 raids that left the underworld trembling. The Oriental overlord's iron fist has now claimed 207 territories in just two weeks of sustained conquest!

Not to be outdone by even a whisker, the immaculately tailored Sir Caprice claimed 101 territories with his trademark surgical precision, falling merely three turfs shy of his previous week's triumph. His 64 strategic strikes were executed with the grace of a ballet dancer and the brutality of a meat cleaver, bringing his two-week total to a staggering 203 turfs!

The Vacation Brothers – those sun-kissed sultans of sin – have clearly decided their tropical tans need complementing with some territorial expansion. Vacation Steve boosted his holdings with 42 more turfs (matching last week's performance exactly), while his partner in paradise Vacation Albert scaled back his ambitions slightly to a respectable 31 new territories. Sources whisper that the Cabana Cartel is planning something spectacular for the summer season!

SPECIAL BULLETIN: THE HEADQUARTERS HOLOCAUST CONTINUES!

The week's most spine-chilling spectacle unfolded when Wu-Tang's iron-fisted army once again kicked down the doors of poor SPEROD's headquarters – marking the second consecutive week this unfortunate soul has suffered such indignity! But the Oriental mastermind wasn't finished with his educational program, as his enforcers also delivered harsh lessons to the headquarters of Aharhibaba, 2345p, and Muna.

Meanwhile, Sir Caprice continued his own scholarly pursuits, adding the scalps of Jeeva1661, jan kooh, Reti, Joshie, and ayan to his ever-growing collection of conquered headquarters!

FRESH BLOOD AND FAMILIAR FACES IN THE FRAY

The crimson-coated commander Blood Captain proved once again why he's the most feared raider in all of Vendetta City, executing a mind-boggling 96 separate raids – tying with Wu-Tang himself for the week's most aggressive assault record! His territorial gains of 26 turfs came as mere appetizers to his main course of systematic plunder.

Rising through the ranks like smoke from a Tommy gun, we witness the continued ascension of Donald Trump (+22 turfs), the scholarly SCRIPTUS (+20 turfs), and the venerable GodFather (+15 turfs). New blood has also trickled into our fair city, with six fresh faces including the dashingly named Flash Gordon and the war-painted John James Rambo, each claiming their first precious turf in this concrete jungle.

THE MIGHTY CONTINUE THEIR SPECTACULAR TUMBLE

The tragic tale of the FIFTH BLOOD EMPEROR grows ever more sorrowful, dear readers! This once-mighty sovereign has now been stripped of another 29 territories, bringing his catastrophic two-week losing streak to a jaw-dropping 57 turfs lost! The former emperor was also subjected to 30 separate raids this week, suggesting his imperial treasury has become the city's most popular shopping destination.

StreetKing continues his own spectacular descent from grace, hemorrhaging 26 more turfs while enduring 27 raids upon his crumbling kingdom. The eastern mystic Ustaz Ice found his empire melting away by 24 territories, while the swirling vortex sucked up 21 losses in what can only be described as a reverse tornado of misfortune.

POLICE BLOTTER

• SPEROD was last seen packing his belongings for the second week running, muttering something about "finding a nice quiet town with fewer Oriental visitors."

• Flash Gordon reportedly arrived in Vendetta City via rocket ship, though neighbors suspect it was merely a very loud automobile with creative exhaust modifications.

• The Vacation Brothers were spotted comparing travel brochures between territory raids, with sources suggesting their next expansion might include beachfront properties.
